overview: Gate Management Inventory System with role-based access control. Tracks visitor check-ins and check-outs across 5 visitor categories (Guest, Employer, Soldier, Temporary Employee, Special Guest). Super Admin manages up to 3 Admins and 4 Users; privileges apply immediately. Full entry/exit log with search and date range filter.
features: Role-based access: Super Admin, Admin, and User roles with immediate privilege assignment
Visitor check-in/out with 5 categories: Guest, Employer, Soldier, Temporary Employee, Special Guest
Full activity log visible to all users, filterable by category and date range
Admin dashboard for managing users and viewing activity summaries
Protected pages and role-enforced actions via authorization extension
